question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Make resolved graph state a deterministic function of the SET of assertions, never arrival/episode/worker order. Today replaceNodes/replaceEdges are destructive per-file replace + a later cross-file pass = whole-graph order-sensitive.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: OR-set add-tag dedup key = (subject,predicate,object), NOT the content-addressed id (which folds source/generation); re-asserting a triple reuses the node (idempotent add), retire-via-edge never delete. Today replaceNodes churns the node on rescan of unchanged symbols.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Supersession winner = argmax over (valid_from DESC, object_canonical ASC) — derived, no stored counter, no actor/rowid in the key. Today the prune tiebreak is ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC (rowid=arrival-order dependent).

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Multi-value register: preserve BOTH concurrent conflicting symbol assertions, record CONTRADICTS, hold lower-trust out of default recall + quarantine, surface via unresolved_current — no silent pick-one loss.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Property test: replay a randomized assertion set under several arrival orders disagreeing with event-time; assert recall set identical AND node count == distinct-assertion count (retired not deleted).

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Run graph signals/PPR ONLY for classes that benefit (MultiHop/Entity), suppress for SingleHop/Temporal/Quote (indiscriminate expansion hurts single-hop precision); the flag is the gate, the weight only shapes fusion. REFINES Q3-C1 which mandates PPR without a precision gate.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Run PPR projection UNDIRECTED so seed mass reaches records pointing AT the seed (directed PPR makes the seed a sink). Today expandAnchor is 1-hop DIRECTED.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Resolve seeds from BM25 entity index (always available) UNIONED with vector entity search (when embedded); lexical half keeps graph expansion alive when embedder down. Today seed-resolver is lexical-only, no dense resolver to union.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Fuse by candidate POSITION in each list, not raw engine score, so PageRank score (higher=nearer) + cosine distance (lower=nearer) combine without normalization. Likely overlaps Q8 fuser adapter.

question: B-002-graphsignals-crdt
claim: Highest-value: class-gated-expansion closes Q3-C1's missing precision gate; CRDT cluster (order-independent merge + OR-set + derived-clock) attacks destructive replaceNodes churn + arrival-order non-determinism; undirected projection corrects a directed-PPR under-reach. newInfoRatio 0.62.
